overview: Shoapzy is a Flipkart-style multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace where sellers list products and buyers shop across all categories. Features a polished blue-and-orange design with hero carousel, deals sections, MRP + discount pricing, and full checkout flow.
features: Flipkart-style blue navbar with search bar and user dropdown
Hero carousel with auto-rotating promotional banners
Deals of the Day — top discounted products
Flash Sale section with newest products
Product cards with MRP strikethrough, selling price, and discount badge
Mock star ratings on product cards
Product upload with MRP + discount pricing
Cart, checkout with delivery address, Stripe + COD payment
Admin dashboard with seller management and order tracking
